comment: Барка "сейчас позову старейшин", обращение к игроку

languages.text: "Вы... Тоже выжившие, да? Подождите немного, я позову наимудрейших. Они вершат наши судьбы".

traits.locale_text: "Вы... Тоже выжившие, да? Подождите немного, я позову наимудрейших. Они вершат наши судьбы".
"Вы... Тоже выжившие, да? Подождите немного, я позову наимудрейших. Они вершат наши судьбы".

languages.text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."
languages.original_text: "Вы... Тоже выжившие, да? Подождите немного, я позову наимудрейших. Они вершат наши судьбы".

traits.locale_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."
"Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."
"Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."

languages.text: "Seid ihr... auch die Überlebenden? Bitte wartet ein wenig, ich werde die Weisen holen. Sie sind es, die uns führen und über unser Schicksal entscheiden."
languages.original_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."

languages.text: "Êtes-vous... Les survivants aussi ? Attendez un peu, je vais amener les Sages. Ce sont eux qui nous guident et décident de notre sort."
languages.original_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."

languages.text: "你们也是幸存者吗？请稍等片刻，我会把贤者们带来。是他们指引我们，决定我们的命运。"
languages.original_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."

languages.text: "¿Sois... ¿Los supervivientes también? Por favor, esperad un poco, traeré a los Sabios. Son ellos los que nos guían y deciden nuestro destino".
languages.original_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."

languages.text: 「あなたは...生存者でもあるのか？少しお待ちください、賢者たちをお連れします。彼らが私たちを導き、運命を決めるのです"
languages.original_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."

languages.text: "Siz... Hayatta kalanlar da mı? Lütfen biraz bekleyin, Bilge Kişileri getireceğim. Onlar bize rehberlik edecek ve kaderimizi belirleyecek."
languages.original_text: "Are you... The survivors too? Please wait a little, I will bring the Wise Ones. It is they who guide us and decide our fate."
